info.name: Easy Orders - Concurrent Order Processing API
info.description: Hexagonal, event-driven order processing system. Run requests top-to-bottom: logging in captures the JWT into {{admin_token}} / {{customer_token}}, creating a product captures {{product_id}}, placing an order captures {{order_id}}. Use the 'Easy Orders - Local' environment.

response.name: OK
